meta.title: Landing a Job in AI: Hiring Secrets from Technical Recruiters
meta.description:
Welcome! DeepLearning.AI, in partnership with FourthBrain, has assembled a panel of AI technical recruiters who will share suggestions and best interviewing practices. While millions of job-seekers are enrolling for AI courses, finding an ML job that matches their skillset remains challenging. We aim to provide an event to help support the global AI community as they continue to look and apply for jobs in the tech space and other industries.

We will be taking questions during the event. Please submit your question or upvote others' here:
https://app.sli.do/event/iFyiCRFJTHBd3s6vJHmSw9

Speakers
Jeffrey Bank, Talent Attractor
https://www.linkedin.com/in/jeffbank/

Nikita Gupta, Senior Tech Recruiter 
https://www.linkedin.com/in/guptanikita16/

Puneet Kohli, Co-founder and CEO, Careerflow
https://www.linkedin.com/in/punkohl/

Moderator
Linda Lee, Talent Partner, AI fund
https://www.linkedin.com/in/linda317lee/

Let us know how we're doing? We will be giving out discount codes for a selected number of people who fill out the survey:
https://forms.gle/kHckUDW4WuRwRunH7

Looking to connect with your peer learners, share projects, and swap advice? Join our AI community: 
https://community.deeplearning.ai/invites/ddzDLVa2jv

To learn more about us and signup for future events:
DeepLearning.AI: https://www.deeplearning.ai/
